synergyRules.description: Hard engage + reliable follow-up CC creates kill pressure in teamfights
Protected ADC can DPS safely in teamfights
Enchanter + ADC amplifies sustained damage output
Frontline engage gives backline carries space to deal damage
Front-to-back teamfight comp with clear threat hierarchy
Pick comp with CC chaining to lock down caught targets
Split push threat + disengage lets team stall 4v5 while split pusher pressures
AP follow-up on engage prevents opponents from stacking armor
